subcodes.first_line: O friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! The universe is in endless progress, and the world of existence is the dawning-place of the lights of the All-Merciful's bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء کون در ترقی بی پایانست و عالم امکان مطلع انوار فیض رحمن و
subcodes.subjects: @purpose; goal of creation, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization
